business.name: Taylors Mark Howard Electric
business.tagline: The electrician other electricians can't handle

hero.headline: The electrician *other electricians* can't handle
hero.subheadline: When three pros say it can't be done, we show up and do it anyway

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every wire, panel, and outlet
services_section.subheading: From the simple stuff to the jobs others won't touch

services.title: Panel Upgrades
services.description: Old panels that need replacing. New circuits that need adding. We handle the power where it starts.

services.title: Service Repairs
services.description: Service masts, main panels, overhead connections. The heavy-duty stuff that keeps your power flowing.

services.title: Fixture Installation
services.description: Chandeliers, ceiling fans, custom lighting. Installed right the first time.

services.title: Electrical Troubleshooting
services.description: Mystery problems, flickering lights, dead outlets. We find what's wrong and fix it.

about.heading: One electrician, real solutions
about.body: We're the Greenville electrician who shows up when others say it can't be done. Fair pricing, honest work, and we answer the phone.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Greenville says about our work

reviews.name: Hunter M.
reviews.text: Mark accomplished what 3 other electricians said couldn't be done. Most competent and best price too.

reviews.name: Jordan F.
reviews.text: Professional, timely, excellent work at reasonable price. Replaced my service mast perfectly.

reviews.name: Donna W.
reviews.text: Returned my call within one day, installed two chandeliers the next. Fair pricing, courteous and professional.

cta.heading: Ready to get the job done right?
cta.body: Free quotes, fair pricing, and we show up when we say we will. Call the electrician Greenville trusts.
